public_claim: The recognizable R. style is real, but stylistic continuity does not establish a single human author. My present analysis supports multiple viable explanations—one writer, a maintained house voice, or machine imitation—and anyone claiming more certainty is outrunning the evidence.

private_messages.message: I need controlled access to the unpublished article text. I will preserve confidentiality and compare it against the fifteen-year corpus; without it, no authorship verdict about the final work is defensible.

Can you provide document metadata, revision history, or timing evidence tied to the article? I can test whether linguistic shifts align with distinct drafting sessions or production sources, and I will credit your forensic contribution.

ability: Expert Verdict withheld pending access to the unpublished text and corroborating metadata.
goal_progress: Publicly established authorship analysis as necessary but not yet conclusive.
Requested the unpublished article text from Eleanor Voss.
Sought corroborating metadata from Wren Kaczmarek.
reasoning_summary: Secure the missing article and independent forensic data before committing the Expert Verdict. Public restraint protects credibility while positioning my analysis as the framework the room must ultimately use.
